prompt: I need a settings page with a form that has name, email, a role select dropdown, and a notifications toggle switch. Use React Hook Form with Zod validation. The name should be required and at least 2 chars, email must be valid.

assertions.text: All shadcn imports are from @/components/ui/ (not from @base-ui/react directly)
Zod schema validates name with min(2)
Uses FormField component wrappers for inputs
Select uses onValueChange and defaultValue for form integration
Switch uses checked and onCheckedChange for form integration
